en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: WITH STRINGED INSTRUMENTS. OF DAVID. Hear my cry, O God, listen to my prayer;
zh: 神啊！求你聽我的呼求， 留心聽我的禱告。

en: from the end of the earth I call to you when my heart is faint. Lead me to the rock that is higher than I,
zh: 我內心沮喪的時候， 我從地極向你呼求； 求你領我到那比我更高的磐石上面去。

en: for you have been my refuge, a strong tower against the enemy.
zh: 因為你作過我的避難所， 作過我逃避仇敵的堅固堡壘。

en: Let me dwell in your tent forever! Let me take refuge under the shelter of your wings! Selah
zh: 我要永遠住在你的帳棚裡， 投靠在你翅膀下的隱密處。

en: For you, O God, have heard my vows; you have given me the heritage of those who fear your name.
zh: 神啊！你聽了我所許的願； 你把產業賜給敬畏你名的人。

en: Prolong the life of the king; may his years endure to all generations!
zh: 願你增添王的壽數； 願他的年日世世無窮。

en: May he be enthroned forever before God; appoint steadfast love and faithfulness to watch over him!
zh: 願他在 神面前永遠作王； 願你指派慈愛和誠實保護他。

en: So will I ever sing praises to your name, as I perform my vows day after day.
zh: 這樣，我要永遠歌頌你的名， 並且天天還我向你所許的願。
